text.title: QA Performance Run Verdict Template Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real deployments. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: SLO target rewritten after the run to make a regression 'pass'.
antipattern.fix: Lock SLOs in ops/slo.yaml; require PR to change them before any run uses them.

antipattern.symptom: Verdict PASS but only 80 samples; later incident shows real regression.
antipattern.fix: Set INCONCLUSIVE when samples<floor; rerun with more load.

antipattern.symptom: Baseline from 6 months ago shows the new run as 'fast'.
antipattern.fix: Auto-flag baselines >30d; require explicit ack to use.
